case_title: OTTERSON DENISE VS TYLAVSKY GREG DBA CARS OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TYLAVSKY GREG DBA CARS OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY OTTERSON DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT TYLAVSKY GREG DBA CARS OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OTTERSON DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TYLAVSKY GREG DBA CARS OF SAN FRANCISCO $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
